evidence: "Good for a relaxing, evening family movie that doesn’t require thinking."
"Love Downton Abbey. Romance, intrigue, comedy and set in a stylish era wit perfect costuming and the oh so very English way of life!"
"Ok if you are in a mood not to use your brain."
"Good message, but again, it is a movie for children."
"Good for a relaxing, evening family movie that doesn’t require thinking."
"I like the way Alex seems to be coming off his surgeon's pedestal and is finding satisfaction as well as challenges in the free clinic."
"Very poor acting on the part of Henry Winkler. Katherine Hepburn was outstanding as always but had a very small part."
"There are definitely more elaborate and polished productions of this story but this one has a special place in my heart."
"I have watched many versions of this Jane Austen classic and this is my favorite by far!"
"I love this show and cannot wait for season 4."
"Put one of these DVDs into your player and be whisked away on a comforting, magical journey."
"I can still sit in 'my own little corner in my own little chair' and be transported to a magical place."
"A portrayal of true heroes and their selflessness."
"This one has a special place in my heart and in my fairy tale collection."

summary: The user enjoys light-hearted family films and romantic dramas, often preferring simple narratives that evoke emotional resonance. They appreciate a comforting and nostalgic viewing experience, with a focus on character-driven stories rather than high production values.
